summary: Iteration 13: Tested OrganizerNav mini-menu component on all organizer dashboard pages. All features working correctly - navigation component displays correctly on /organizer (3 cards), /organizer/event/{id} (5 cards), and /organizer/checkin/{id} (5 cards). Navigation clicks work properly, active card highlighting with border-brand class works as expected.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13: Verified OrganizerNav mini-menu component implementation. The component (data-testid='organizer-nav') is a reusable navigation component that displays different cards based on context: 1) On /organizer (main dashboard): Shows 3 cards - 'Tableau de bord' (active), 'Finances', 'Créer'. The 'Créer' card opens the create event dialog. 2) On /organizer/event/{id} (event management page): Shows 5 cards - 'Tableau de bord', 'Finances', 'Gestion' (active), 'Check-in', 'Résultats'. 3) On /organizer/checkin/{id} (check-in page): Shows 5 cards - 'Tableau de bord', 'Finances', 'Gestion', 'Check-in' (active), 'Résultats'. Each card has data-testid='org-nav-{id}' (dashboard, finances, create, manage, checkin, results). Active cards are highlighted with 'border-brand' class. Navigation works correctly - clicks navigate to correct routes. Uses framer-motion for animations.
features_verified: OrganizerNav component present on /organizer with 3 cards
OrganizerNav component present on /organizer/event/{id} with 5 cards
OrganizerNav component present on /organizer/checkin/{id} with 5 cards
Cards have correct data-testid attributes (org-nav-dashboard, org-nav-finances, org-nav-create, org-nav-manage, org-nav-checkin, org-nav-results)
Active card highlighting (border-brand class) works on all pages
Click on 'Tableau de bord' navigates to /organizer
Click on 'Créer' opens create event dialog
Orange icons and uppercase text style consistent with app design
